title: heliopsis laevis var. scabra
intro: Heliopsis laevis var. scabra is a flowering plant native to North America, also known as rough prairie heliopsis or smooth oxeye. It is a member of the sunflower family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and relief from congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization of its health benefits.
